description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image for all jobs, with two stages: lint and test. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs the following commands: wget -O- -nv https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s v1.23.8, apt-get update, apt-get -y install python3-pip, pip3 install codespell, go get -d ./..., ./bin/golangci-lint run -c .golangci.yml ./..., make markdown-spellcheck, and make test. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs: go get -d ./..., and make test-long pkgs="./" run=., with the same golang:latest image and no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
